title: austrobrickellia arnottii
intro: Austrobrickellia arnottii, also known as Brickellia arnottii, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is a shrub native to Mexico and Central America, valued for its medicinal properties and traditional uses. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Austrobrickellia arnottii is often prepared as an infusion or decoction to make a tea that can be consumed to benefit from its health-promoting properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
